_meta.description: Quarterly and annual financial data for US Bitcoin mining companies
_meta.note: Data collected from company IR websites and earnings reports

data.notes: FY2024: Revenue $463.3M (+63% YoY). Net income $54.0M. Adj EBITDA $117.5M. 1,720 BTC held. D&A ($24.7M) included in COGS. Operating income includes unrealized BTC gain $44.3M. Source: 20-F filed 2025-04-21, press release 2025-03-25.
FY2023: Revenue $284.1M. Net income $10.5M. Adj EBITDA $41.7M. 1,180 BTC held. Pre-IPO (SPAC merger March 2024). Source: 20-F, comparative period in FY2024 press release.
FY2024: Revenue $376.7M (+34% YoY). Net income $109.4M. 17,722 BTC held. $468M cash.
FY2024 (ends Sep 30): Revenue $378.9M (+125% YoY). Net income $246.7M. 8,049 BTC held.
Revenue down 33% YoY. Self-mined 974 BTC at $51,035 cost. Cash position $836.2M
Q4 2024 revenue $31.7M vs $38.9M prior year. Net income $152M including BTC fair value gains.
Q4 2024 Adj EBITDA $2.5M (down from $6.3M in Q3). Cash balance $274M.
FY2024 Adj EBITDA $60.4M, up 89% from $31.9M in FY2023
Q4 2024: Revenue up 21% YoY. Gross mining margin 47%. Net income $15M. Earned 654 BTC at $40,800 cost.
Q4 2024 revenue $42M, up 75% from $24M in Q3 2024
Gross profit margin 7.14%. Adj EBITDA down 92% YoY. Fiscal year ends May 31.
Q4 2024 revenue. Note: Q4 2025 revenue was $224.8M
Q4 2024 revenue. EPS beat estimates. Gross margin 42.3%.
FY2024 revenue $108M, up 141% YoY. Cloud services revenue $45.7M first year.
Q1 2025: Revenue $213.88M. Net loss due to Bitcoin price decline in Q1.
Q2 2025: Record revenue $238.5M (+64% YoY), Net income $808.2M.
Q3 2025: Revenue $252.4M, Net Income $123.1M (from Quartr). Source: Company report.
FY2025: Revenue $919.17M (+53.5% YoY). Record net income due to Bitcoin appreciation. BTC holdings 52,850.
